title: Fable 5 Dies in 4 Days... Do these 5 Things RIGHT NOW
summary:
📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5
🩵 Free Prompts: https://bit.ly/4gWfKlH
🔥 Glaido: https://bit.ly/4eGoI3R

Fable 5 is the strongest model you can get your hands on right now, and in three days it moves off the Claude app and onto the API only. So I want to show you five things worth doing before that happens. You'll build a full wheel of life review, get genuinely premium website design out of one prompt, and set up an agentic operating system that tracks your spend and improves itself overnight. We also run Fable 5 against Opus 4.8 on a real security review with three independent models judging, and Fable 5 wins by a consistent 12 point margin. And I'll walk you through exactly how to use low, medium, high and max so you get the most out of it for the least money.

*Core Software*
🩵 Free Resources: https://bit.ly/3RNNDLa
🔥 Glaido: https://bit.ly/4eGoI3R
☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/
💬 ChatGPT: https://chatgpt.com/
🚀 AntiGravity: https://antigravity.google/
📁 GitHub: https://github.com/

⌚️ Stamps:
00:00 - Fable 5 Disappears In 3 Days
00:35 - The Car And Driver Rule
02:15 - Level One: Your Wheel Of Life
04:15 - Level Two: Website Design
07:43 - Level Three: Agentic Operating System
10:02 - Level Four: Second Pair Of Eyes
11:45 - The Guardrail Problem
12:49 - Level Five: Find The Bottleneck
14:04 - How To Use Fable 5 Going Forward
14:48 - Five Quick Hacks

Everything you need to know about Fable 5, including the wheel of life prompt, one shot website design, building an agentic operating system, security reviews against Opus 4.8, and the low, medium, high and max settings before it moves to the Claude API.

#Fable5 #ClaudeAI #AgenticAI #ClaudeCode #AIWorkflow #JackRoberts
